name: trikonam-website
description: Phase 1 showcase website for Trikonam — an authentic Classical Hatha Yoga school.

scripts.//optimize-images: Run LOCALLY when source photos change. Regenerates /public/images from /assets/source-images and commits the results. Not a build hook: Cloudflare's Linux build box has no HEIC decoder.
scripts.//image-variants: Run LOCALLY when /public/images changes. Generates responsive width variants + src/content/image-manifest.json, both committed. Not a build hook.
